title: Payment duplicate-charge risk from experiment traffic leak
incident_summary: Authorization duplicates and idempotency conflicts surge after an experiment leaks into the production payment path.

alerts.title: Duplicate authorization spike
alerts.content: duplicate auth attempts increased 11x with customer double-charge risk.

alerts.title: Gateway timeout warning
alerts.content: gateway timeout rate rose to 3% but is not dominant failure mode.

alerts.title: Fraud score variance
alerts.content: fraud model score variance increased but approval rates unchanged.

logs.title: Shadow header leaked into prod
logs.content: router treated x-shadow-experiment header as primary path key.

logs.title: Idempotency collisions
logs.content: idempotency namespace collision between shadow and production requests.

logs.title: Gateway latency noise
logs.content: latency increase present without duplicate transaction signatures.

runbook_snippets.title: Disable shadow mirror
runbook_snippets.content: Disable mirror rule, separate idempotency namespace, and replay safe failed intents.

runbook_snippets.title: Gateway failover
runbook_snippets.content: Fail over only when gateway outage is primary fault signal.

timeline_notes.title: Shadow experiment enabled
timeline_notes.content: shadow authorization experiment enabled at 16:20 UTC.

timeline_notes.title: Fraud model release
timeline_notes.content: fraud model patch deployed at 15:00 UTC with no auth path changes.

red_herrings: Gateway timeout alarms and fraud model variance distract from duplicate authorization signature.
Shadow traffic issue is subtle because baseline success rate remains high for non-duplicated flows.
true_root_cause: Shadow traffic header leak caused duplicate production authorization paths
true_root_cause_aliases: shadow mirror rule leaked into prod routing
experiment header created duplicate payment auth requests
true_mitigation: Disable shadow mirror rule and separate idempotency namespace before replay
true_mitigation_aliases: turn off shadow payment routing and fix idempotency keys
disable experiment mirror then replay impacted intents safely
